Visual localization methods are categorized into image-based and structure-based systems. Image-based systems recover camera poses by finding the most similar one in the database with global features.

Visual localization methods are categorized into image-based and structure-based systems. Structure-based methods build a sparse 3D map via SfM and estimate the pose via PnP from 2D-3D correspondences.
